# Phase 3 Coefficients oracle (Python sympy/mpmath cross-check).
# Captured by: python3 external/probes/coefficients-oracle/capture.py
# Compared against oracles.txt (wolframscript) by verify.jl.

# Case 3.1.1 -- exp(z) Taylor coeffs, order 10. Source: c_k = 1/k! exact rationals.
c_3_1_1_exp_o10_py = [1.0, 1.0, 0.5, 0.16666666666666666, 0.041666666666666664, 0.008333333333333333, 0.001388888888888889, 0.0001984126984126984, 2.48015873015873e-05, 2.7557319223985893e-06, 2.755731922398589e-07]

# Case 3.1.2 -- Bessel ratio Taylor coeffs, order 14.
# Source: explicit J_nu power series, sympy series of the ratio.
